title: Electricity Generation
discoveryHint: Reach the LV age to learn about electricity.

sections.text: The Steam Turbine is the first generator available. It converts steam into EU at a ratio of 2 Steam = 1 EU. Later tiers unlock combustion generators, gas turbines, and eventually fusion reactors.
Each single-block generator produces 1 Amp at its voltage tier. For LV, that means 32 EU/t. If a machine requires 16 EU/t, one packet of 32 EU is sent every other tick.
